text: Implement TopologyProvider concrete classes and post-hoc validator per prd.md and spec.

Create ripple/providers/topology_loaders.py with FileTopologyProvider (SNAP/JSON/GraphML/CSV/GML) and SyntheticTopologyProvider (BA/WS/SBM/ER). NetworkX optional dep, asyncio.to_thread() wrapping, caching.
Create ripple/providers/topology_validator.py with TopologyValidator (scale/structure/type_dist checks), ValidationReport dataclass. Logs only, no LLM output modification.
Register providers in registry.py _PROVIDER_LAZY_IMPORTS. Update __init__.py exports.
Add _validate_topology() in runtime.py after INIT phase. Calls TopologyValidator when provider available.
Add networkx>=3.0 as optional dependency in pyproject.toml.
